name: PAIRED BAR

meta.form: two horizontal bars per category on one shared scale
meta.data_required: categories in a natural order with two comparable measures each

alternatives: CH-DST-02 (dots when the gap is the story)

see_instead.when: the gap between the two measures is the story
labels are short and periods few

use_when: two measures per category with long labels (plan vs actual, A vs B)
natural category order that must be kept (process steps, stages)
not_when: ranking is the message (sort and use CH-RNK-01)

data_shape.title: action title with a number
data_shape.series_labels: [name_a, name_b], printed on the first row
data_shape.categories: array of {label, values: [a, b]}, input order kept

rules: input order kept: magnitude, not ranking
series named on the first row labels, never a legend
shared zero-based scale for both measures
anti_patterns: more than two bars per category
